features.subhead: A complete solution for SMEs that want precise financial control without complexity.
features.f0desc: Real-time sync via TrueLayer and Salt Edge. Import transactions, balances and movements from hundreds of European banks without manual effort.
features.f1desc: Create, customise and send invoices with automatic VAT, multi-currency and payment tracking. Integrated with your tax data.
features.f2title: Full visibility of your cash flow
features.f2desc: Interactive dashboards, financial forecasts and monthly comparisons to make informed decisions about your business.
features.f3desc: Automatically calculates VAT, corporate tax and income tax exposure. Never get caught off guard again.

howItWorks.subhead: From zero to complete financial control in less than 5 minutes.
howItWorks.s1desc: In less than 2 minutes, connect all your bank accounts via Open Banking. We support 300+ Portuguese and European banks.
howItWorks.s1detail: TrueLayer · Salt Edge · No shared passwords
howItWorks.s2desc: Transactions are imported and categorised automatically. View your cash flow, taxes and invoices in real time.
howItWorks.s3desc: With accurate, real-time financial data, make informed decisions, reduce costs and identify growth opportunities.
howItWorks.s3detail: Reports · Forecasts · Export for your accountant

testimonials.t1quote: We replaced 3 separate tools and a chaos of spreadsheets. Our monthly close now takes 4 hours instead of 3 days.
testimonials.t2quote: Open Banking connection was live in 90 seconds. Real-time cash flow visibility that I thought only enterprises could afford.
testimonials.t3quote: Tax deadlines used to keep me up at night. SGT Finance tracks our VAT exposure automatically — no more surprises.

faq.headline: Questions, answered.
faq.a1: 300+ banks across Europe via TrueLayer and Salt Edge — Revolut, N26, ING, Santander, BBVA, Monzo, Starling, Millennium, BPI and most major EU banks. Read-only PSD2 access. Your credentials are never shared.
faq.q2: Can I export data for my accountant?
faq.a2: Yes. Export transactions, invoices and tax reports as PDF, CSV or Excel at any time. Compatible with Sage, Xero and QuickBooks.
faq.q3: What happens to my data if I cancel?
faq.a3: Your data stays accessible for 30 days after cancellation. Export everything before leaving. We never delete data without your explicit confirmation.
faq.q4: How is my banking data kept secure?
faq.a4: GDPR & PSD2 compliant. AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit. Read-only bank access — we cannot move money. EU infrastructure with ISO 27001 certification.
faq.q5: Does it work for multi-company management?
faq.a5: Pro supports up to 3 companies. Business supports unlimited entities — ideal for holding groups, accountants or consultants managing multiple clients.
faq.q6: Is there a free trial for paid plans?
faq.a6: The Free plan is free forever. Paid plans include a 14-day free trial — no credit card required until you decide to upgrade.
faq.q7: Which VAT and tax regimes are supported?
faq.a7: All major EU VAT regimes — PT, FR, DE, ES, IT, NL and more. Tax rules update automatically. Country-specific questions answered by our support team.
faq.q8: Can I switch plans at any time?
faq.a8: Upgrades are instant and prorated. Downgrades take effect at end of billing cycle. No contracts, no lock-in — cancel anytime.
